experts.title: Senior Environmental, Health, Safety, Social & Sustainability (EHS&S) Specialist
experts.bio_summary: Senior Environmental, Health, Safety, Social and Sustainability (EHS&S) professional with 24+ years of field-based experience leading ESHSS management for major oil and gas development projects across North and Central Africa, ensuring compliance with IFC Performance Standards and Equator Principles, including the Chad-Cameroon Development Project.

education_certifications.title: B.Sc., Botany, Ecology, and Plant Physiology
Personal Survival Techniques - Fire Prevention & Fighting (PST-FPF)

needs_review: Profile is oil/gas/chemical-sector EHS&S - does not map cleanly to the TOR's 23 humanitarian/development sectors. Primary sector 'Access and safety' and secondary 'Core Humanitarian Standards'/'Protection' are best-guess fits; confirm with team.

No donor_experience recorded - career is private-sector/EPC oil & gas (ExxonMobil, Petrofac, international operators), not donor-funded humanitarian/development programs; none of the seeded donors apply.

Geography limited to Chad and Cameroon (Chad-Cameroon Development Project) per West/Central Africa+Sahel policy; Algeria and Egypt assignments (El Merk, In Salah Gas, Salam Gas Trains) not recorded - outside policy scope and not in the geographies lookup table.

Languages: excluded Spanish and German per language policy. 'Fondo-/Fefe/Fufulde' in the CV is ambiguous (Fe'fe' is a Cameroonian Grassfields language, not regional Sahel) - retained as 'Fulfulde' assuming OCR/typo for that language; confirm.
role_fit 'Field technical monitoring' is a guess based on EHSS field-monitoring/audit-readiness background - confirm.
affiliation_type set to 'internal' based on folder placement - confirm.

experts.title: Senior Conflict, Stabilization and Natural Resources Governance Specialist
experts.bio_summary: Conflict, stabilization, and natural resources governance specialist with 15+ years designing and managing donor-funded programs across West Africa (Burkina Faso, Cote d'Ivoire, Mali, Niger), with extensive USAID, World Bank, GIZ, and DANIDA experience in conflict early warning, CVE/DDR, cross-border governance, and social cohesion.

donor_experience.notes: Project Director, USAID/SRO-funded LCapS Activity, ACSD (2024-2025); Director, Stabilization and Social Cohesion, USAID-funded IGR Project, Creative Associates (2022-2023); Program Manager, USAID/OTI-funded Burkina Faso Regional Program (BFRP), Chemonics (2019-2021)
Rehabilitation Consultant, World Bank-funded Post-Conflict Assistance Project, Cote d'Ivoire (2012-2013)
Deputy Director, Daloa Regional Service Center / Bouake Regional Monitoring Office, EU and World Bank-funded Programme de Reinsertion des Ex-Combattants, executed by GIZ, Cote d'Ivoire (2009-2010)

Program Coordinator, DANIDA-funded Border and Security Management Program, Danish Demining Group, Burkina Faso/Mali/Niger (2014-2019); Project Coordinator, DANIDA-funded Community Safety Project, DDG, Cote d'Ivoire (2013-2014)
Co-funder (with World Bank) of Programme de Reinsertion des Ex-Combattants executed by GIZ, Cote d'Ivoire (2009-2010)

experts.title: Senior Land Tenure, Natural Resource Management and Conflict Specialist
experts.bio_summary: Senior researcher with 15+ years leading policy-relevant studies on land tenure as a driver of violent extremism in Burkina Faso, including evaluation of major donor-funded interventions (USAID, World Bank), with deep expertise in land governance, IDP land access, and community/project-level MEAL systems.

donor_experience.notes: Land Use and NRM Specialist, USAID-funded RISE II Terres Eau Vie Project, Winrock/TetraTech (2023-2024); Deputy Chief of Party, USAID-funded RISE II ASTER Project, ONF-BF (2020-2021)
Regional M&E/Land Officer then Regional Coordinator, World Bank-funded PNGT Phase III Project (2014-2019)

experts.title: Senior Communication, Collaboration-Learning-Adaptation (CLA) and Knowledge Management Specialist
experts.bio_summary: Senior bilingual (French/English) communication, Collaboration-Learning-Adaptation (CLA), and information/knowledge management specialist with more than 10 years on USAID-funded governance, stabilization and gender/social-inclusion programs in Burkina Faso; Gender and Social Inclusion (GESI) focal point; recognized as a 2022 Goalkeeper by the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation.

donor_experience.notes: Communication/CLA Manager, USAID's Inclusive Governance for Resilience (IGR) Activity, Creative Associates (2024-2025); Information Management Specialist (incl. GESI focal point), USAID's On Est Ensemble (OEE) Activity, Chemonics (2022-2024); Information Management Specialist, USAID/OTI Burkina Faso Regional Program (BFRP), Chemonics (2018-2022)

experts.title: Senior Program Management Specialist - Food Security and Trade Capacity
experts.bio_summary: Strategic international development and program management leader with 30+ years advancing food security, agricultural trade capacity, and institutional resilience across Africa, the Caribbean, South America, and Asia; expert in USDA/USAID/State Department program design, grants and cooperative-agreement management, with extensive West Africa experience including Burkina Faso, Senegal, Mali, Niger, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Sierra Leone, Cote d'Ivoire, Togo, Cameroon, Chad, and Nigeria.

donor_experience.notes: Food for Development Manager & Fellow, oversaw 11 USAID P.L. 480 Title II programs in West Africa (1993-2000); secured $8.9M USAID multi-year grant as Country Representative, Senegal (2001-2004); led design of USDA/USAID technical assistance programs totaling $78M across nine countries incl. West Africa region as Agricultural Development Advisor, USDA Foreign Agricultural Service (2010-2025)

needs_review: Most achievements are attributed to USDA (Foreign Agricultural Service) funding, not a seeded donor; attributed to 'USAID' only where USDA programs explicitly overlapped with USAID requirements/co-funding (P.L. 480 Title II, USAID/Senegal grant) per the seeded-donors-only policy - confirm whether a separate 'USDA' donor entry should be added to the lookup table.

Geography list trimmed to West/Central Africa + Sahel countries present in the geographies table per project policy; broader career also covers the Caribbean (Haiti), South America (Brazil, Colombia, Peru), Asia (Pakistan, Vietnam), and East/Horn of Africa (Rwanda, Uganda, Eritrea, Ethiopia) - not recorded.
